TRANSLATION OF DOCUMENT 2101-PS
1941 REICHSGESETZBLATT, PART I, PAGE 192
Decree of the Fuehrer and Reich Chancellor concerning the Inspector General of the German Highways Administration of the 3rd of April 1941.
The Inspector General of the German Highways Administration has the power of a Reich Minister.
Berlin, April 3, 1941
The Fuehrer and Reich Chancellor
Adolf Hitler
The Reichminister and Chief of the Reich Chancellery
Dr. Lammers
Source:
Nazi Conspiracy and Aggression Volume IV
Office of the United States Chief Counsel for Prosecution of Axis Criminality
Washington, DC : United States Government Printing Office, 1946
